arabic: لَا تَنْفَصِلُ الشَّعْرِيَّةُ الْعَرَبِيَّةُ عَنِ الْبُعْدِ الرُّوحِيِّ، حَتَّى إِنَّ أَبَا تَمَّامٍ وَالْمُتَنَبِّيَ وَامْرَأَ الْقَيْسِ يَتَشَارَكُونَ نَسَغَ الْكَلِمَةِ الْمُتَجَاوِزَةِ لِحُدُودِ مَا هُوَ مَقُولٌ.
translation: Arapska poetika je neodvojiva od duhovne dimenzije, toliko da Abu Tammam, al-Mutanabbi i Imru al-Qays dijele saft riječi koja nadilazi granice izrecivog.
translationEn: Arab poetics is inseparable from the spiritual dimension, to the point that Abu Tammam, al-Mutanabbi and Imru al-Qays share the sap of the word that transcends the boundaries of the sayable.
